{{Infobox location
| name = Garden (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Garden is a vast underground chamber where the [[Gardeners]] reside.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Garden is a location where [[Ayana]]'s whistle echoed.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Garden is a location with subterranean gates.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]]'s training in the Garden focused on entering and exiting common structures.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
